seo.title: RAG Retrieval Quality Optimization in Flowise Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix rag retrieval quality optimization in Flowise agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: In Flowise, RAG Retrieval Quality Optimization issues manifest as vector store retriever nodes returning irrelevant or low-scoring documents to downstream LLM chains, causing hallucinated or inaccurate responses in chatflows. Drag-and-drop configurations often lack built-in relevance filtering, leading to chatflow chains processing noisy context without validation. This is exacerbated by multi-agent flows where poor retrieval cascades through sequential agent handoffs, amplifying errors in production deployments.

howItManifests.scenario: Vector Store Retriever node with default similarity threshold
howItManifests.symptom: Retriever returns documents with cosine similarity < 0.7
howItManifests.impact: LLM generates responses based on weakly relevant context

howItManifests.scenario: Chatflow chain without retrieval score validation
howItManifests.symptom: Intermediate outputs reference irrelevant document chunks
howItManifests.impact: Final responses mix accurate info with hallucinated details

howItManifests.scenario: Multi-agent RAG flow with sequential retrieval
howItManifests.symptom: Agent handoffs lose retrieval context quality

howItManifests.scenario: Custom retriever tool node without error boundaries
howItManifests.symptom: Silent failures return empty or malformed document arrays
howItManifests.impact: Chatflow continues with zero-context LLM calls

fixes.name: Dynamic Similarity Threshold
fixes.description: Configure Flowise retriever with adaptive similarity filtering

fixes.name: Retrieval Score Prompt Guard

fixes.name: Fallback Multi-Retriever
fixes.description: Chain keyword + semantic search with quality gating

vexAutomation.heading: Automating RAG Retrieval Quality Optimization Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description:
Vex integrates directly as a callback handler in Flowise chatflows, automatically monitoring retriever scores, context relevance, and document quality across all RAG nodes. It establishes baselines from your production traffic and alerts on retrieval degradation using statistical process control. 

Vex's agentic remediation automatically applies similarity threshold adjustments, reroutes queries to fallback retrievers, and A/B tests retrieval configurations without manual intervention. The platform captures full retriever traces including embeddings, metadata filters, and LLM context windows for root cause analysis.

Integration requires one line of configuration and works across all Flowise nodes - VectorStore, ConversationalRetrievalQA, and custom tool retrievers - providing unified observability for multi-agent RAG pipelines.

cta.heading: Detect and Fix This Automatically with Vex
cta.description: Add one line of Vex callback code to your Flowise chatflows and eliminate RAG retrieval failures forever.
